# Build & Run

## Build (single DOI)

```bash
docker build --progress=plain -f docker/Dockerfile.imagewithdata --build-arg APP_IMAGE=ghcr.io/firms-gta/tunaatlas-app:main --build-arg DATA_IMAGE=ghcr.io/firms-gta/tunaatlas-data:main --build-arg DATASET_FILE=global_catch_ird_level2_1950_2024_harmonized_20834708.qs --build-arg DOI_CSV=$'DOI,Filename\n10.5281/zenodo.20834708,global_catch_ird_level2_1950_2024_harmonized.csv\n' -t tunaatlas-single:local .

```

## Build (multiple DOIs)

```bash
To be done

```

## Run

```bash
docker run --rm -p 3838:3838 tunaatlas-single:local
```
